items_done.name: M0v-1
items_done.evidence: PR #1 (talmacschen-arch/lightning-bug-regression) MERGED via squash; merge commit 14136dae94779c9a5c97df76fdba6216d0cd2865 == origin/main HEAD; README.md line 12 verified as '> 状态：**M0 项目骨架阶段**。详见 [`design.md`](./design.md)（v1.3，1800+ 行）。'

last_failures.detail: Round 1: doc-writer (agent addb89c9991fa31bc) committed the correct README change but pushed directly to origin/main as 4db14d7 — never created a feature branch, never opened a PR. Recovered in round 2 by dispatching a fresh doc-writer (ae3c26ef6a2e10dda) with explicit steps: lease-protected force-push to revert main back to c47ffa5, then create branch docs/readme-design-linecount-1800, recommit, push, open PR #1, arm auto-merge --squash. Auto-merge fired, squash-merge landed as 14136da. Post-sprint TODO: patch .claude/agents/doc-writer.md 5-step contract to include explicit `git checkout -b <feature-branch>` as step 0 — current spec assumes worktree starts on a feature branch but does not enforce it.
